title: Wild North & Mount Kenya Expedition
description: A unique expedition combining wildlife safari and a Mount Kenya climb. Explore Samburu’s rare species, experience authentic cultural interactions, then embark on a multi-day trek to Africa’s second highest peak before relaxing at Ol Pejeta Conservancy.
highlights: Samburu safari with rare northern species
Mount Kenya summit trek via Timau Route
Luxury mountain camping with VIP setup
Ol Pejeta Conservancy rhino sanctuary visit
Combination of trekking and wildlife safari
Views of Mount Kenya peaks and alpine landscapes

itinerary.title: Arrival in Nairobi
itinerary.description: Arrival at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport and transfer to hotel for overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Drive to Samburu
itinerary.description: Scenic drive to Samburu National Reserve followed by afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Samburu Safari & Cultural Experience
itinerary.description: Full day game drives and a traditional Samburu cultural experience including community interaction.

itinerary.title: Start Mount Kenya Trek
itinerary.description: Transfer to Timau route and begin trek through moorland to Marania Camp.

itinerary.title: Marania to Major’s Camp
itinerary.description: Hike through mountain terrain towards Major’s Camp with scenic views.

itinerary.title: Major’s Camp to Simba Tarn
itinerary.description: Gradual ascent through alpine landscapes to Simba Tarn Camp.

itinerary.title: Summit Attempt – Point Lenana
itinerary.description: Early morning trek for sunrise summit and descent to Austrian Hut.

itinerary.title: Technical Climb & Descent
itinerary.description: Optional technical climb towards Batian and descent to Mackinder’s Camp.

itinerary.title: Descend & Transfer to Ol Pejeta
itinerary.description: Descend from Mount Kenya and transfer to Ol Pejeta Conservancy for overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Return to Nairobi
itinerary.description: Morning game drive followed by return transfer to Nairobi for departure.

included: Mount Kenya trekking crew and guides
Camping equipment and VIP tent setup
All meals during safari and trek
accommodation: Four Points by Sheraton – Nairobi (1 night)
Simba Tarn Camp – Mount Kenya (1 night)
Austrian Hut / Mackinder’s Camp – Mount Kenya (2 nights)
Sweetwaters Serena Camp – Ol Pejeta (1 night)

travelInfo.clothes: Layered clothing for varying climates, proper hiking boots, warm gear for high altitude and comfortable safari wear.
travelInfo.food: Full board meals during safari and trek with prepared meals by camp crew and lodges.

note: Mount Kenya climb includes high-altitude trekking and optional technical climbing. Suitable for physically fit travelers.
